headline: Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW): A Strong Dividend Stock with Quality Profitability and Sustainable Growth
summary: Discover ITW's reliable dividend profile with an 8/10 Dividend Rating, 2.44% yield, 57.72% payout ratio, and strong profitability. A balanced pick for income investors.
